final:
module shift_register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire serial_in,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] parallel_out
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        parallel_out <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        parallel_out <= {parallel_out[2:0], serial_in};
    end
end

endmodule
